data_quality_to_100.why_not_100: Remaining points require primary/official/provider proof for hard claim classes, not more LLM prose.

proof_ladder.public_claim_policy: May support hard report claims when exact-entity matched and source-hashed.
May support strong claims if license permits derived reporting and source evidence is retained.
Good for operating context; not enough for hard finance/UBO claims.
Usable for pre-DD triage and commercial hypotheses with clear limitations.
Never primary proof; may only generate questions, contradictions and next-source routes.

component_breakdown.name: evidence_integrity
component_breakdown.label: Evidence integrity
component_breakdown.rationale: Manifest, run ID, timestamp and evidence envelope are present; all required source-envelope fields are complete.
current_limitations: Evidence completeness is not the same as business-risk completeness.
component_breakdown.close_route: Keep manifest, evidence ledger and source envelope complete for every rerender.

component_breakdown.name: source_readiness
component_breakdown.label: Source readiness
component_breakdown.rationale: Provider preflight is usable but not fully production-clean because deferred hosted fallback routes need recovery or paid/local coverage.
current_limitations: Deferred hosted fallback routes require recovery, backfill or paid/local coverage before production completeness claims.
component_breakdown.close_route: Replace deferred/optional source routes with local bulk cache, paid provider, or scheduled recovery monitor.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: source-health monitor, local OpenSanctions/Yente, paid registry/API fallback

component_breakdown.name: compliance_media
component_breakdown.label: Compliance and media
component_breakdown.rationale: Sanctions screening returned no claim-safe match, while adverse media remains point-in-time and source-limited.
current_limitations: No-hit is not proof of clean reputation.
UBOs/directors still need final sanctions and PEP screening before sign-off.
component_breakdown.close_route: Rerun screening on confirmed legal name, directors, UBOs and aliases; attach exact match/no-hit evidence rows.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: local Yente/OpenSanctions, OFAC cache, adverse-media cache, optional ComplyAdvantage/World-Check pass-through

component_breakdown.name: ownership_governance
component_breakdown.label: Ownership and governance
component_breakdown.rationale: Ownership routes exist, but official UBO/shareholder evidence is not claim-safe in this replay.
current_limitations: Needs primary register extract, shareholder tree and acquisition documents before final UBO claims.
component_breakdown.close_route: Attach current KvK/director extract, UBO/shareholder document or licensed ownership graph with source hash.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: KvK UBO/shareholder extract, Kyckr, Sayari, Company.info/Webservices.nl if document bytes/hash are licensed

component_breakdown.name: finance_integrity
component_breakdown.label: Finance integrity
component_breakdown.rationale: Finance route is technically verified, but no memo-safe official filing or target-specific finance output is available.
current_limitations: Needs official jaarrekening/XBRL or seller P&L before revenue, EBITDA or margin claims.
component_breakdown.close_route: Attach annual account/XBRL/PDF, seller P&L, management accounts or licensed provider filing extract with source hash.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: KvK Dataservice/jaarrekening, Companies House filings, XBRL/ESEF, Kyckr, Company.info, Creditsafe/D&B enrichment

component_breakdown.name: cyber_footprint
component_breakdown.label: Cyber footprint
component_breakdown.rationale: External footprint evidence exists, but provider/CDN context is not target-owned exposure without asset proof.
current_limitations: Not a penetration test, vulnerability assessment or security attestation.
component_breakdown.close_route: Prove asset ownership before hard risk scoring; rerun DNS/TLS/MX/subdomain/CVE/breach checks on confirmed assets.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: DNS zone, domain owner proof, Censys/Shodan, NVD/CVE, TLS/MX scan evidence

component_breakdown.name: business_context
component_breakdown.label: Business context
component_breakdown.rationale: Target-specific public context, award/proxy signals and local source inventory differentiate this target without promoting context rows to official proof.
current_limitations: Context-rich does not mean officially proven finance or ownership.
Award and public-web rows remain source-bound context unless primary artifacts are attached.
component_breakdown.close_route: Attach target-owned pages, archived copies, management answers and seller KPI pack for quantified commercial claims.
component_breakdown.provider_or_document: target website/team/careers, Wayback/source archive, seller KPI pack, customer concentration data

non_negotiable_rule: A public report may be commercially rich with context, but a hard legal/financial/ownership claim remains blocked until primary or licensed-provider source proof is attached.
